name: Free-use Stepsister in Kitchen at Family Dinner
description:
Legitimately hate family dinners lol

The only thing worse than having to listen to the rest of the fam talk about boring sports, etc., is having to answer for the ten hundred millionth time what you're going to do with your life. Ugh, lol

That's why, sometimes you have to sneak off into the kitchen to get a drink or whatever. It just gets tricky when your stepbrother follows you in and has that glint in his eye...
creator: PoppyGirl
